title: Sharp n' Clean
description: Makes the minecraft GUI Sharper and cleaner whilst keeping the vanilla look!
body:
![Sharp n' Clean (Title)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85167dffbd6cd0e3cdf39fe320ccfc4268e8c57c.png)
A simple, lightweight minecraft resourcepack changing the GUI textures to look *Sharp n' clean*.
# Features
There's not much to this pack, only three features:
1. Slots (inventory, hotbar, chests, hoppers, etc) are merged
2. GUI corners have been made _sharper_
3. Buttons in GUIs use a single _clean_ color!
# PAQ (Probably Asked Questions)
### Will this pack work with Resourcepack / Mod X?
If Resourcepack / Mod X doesn't change any vanilla GUI textures, then yes.
### Supported versions?
Currently, 1.18 through 1.20.1 . Beyond 1.20.1 hasn't been tested, pre-1.18 won't work.
### If mod X adds Extra GUIs, will they also look Sharp n' Clean?
Mod support is a priority, but yet to be done.
### Dependencies?
_Minecraft: Java edition_
### How do I install?
Drop the zip file into your game's `resourcepacks` folder. In game, go to `Options...` → `Resourcepacks...` and put `Sharp n' Clean` on the right side and click `Done`.
### I have a suggestion / problem / question / request
Feel free to message me on guilded: @onesome88 _Not available on discord though._
